message:
fix: add metadata.json to syncbranch test setup for factory backend detection

The refactored getConfigFromDB uses factory.NewFromConfigWithOptions which
reads metadata.json to determine the storage backend. Without it, the factory
defaults to SQLite and fails to open the Dolt database created by the tests.

Co-authored-by: David Ahmann <davidahmann@users.noreply.github.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
